data.biography: Poom Nuttapart Tuntistinchai is an actor from Suphan Buri, Thailand signed with Idol Factory. After graduating from Kannasoot Suksalai School, he went on to study at Srinakharinwirot University's College of Social Communication Innovation.
data.name: Nuttapart Tuntistinchai
ณัฐภาสน์ ตันติเสถียรชัย
